name: Cranium
original_name: ปริศนาซากมรณะ
overview: As two of a very few biological anthropologists in the country, a catastrophic plane crash forces two doctors and former university rivals to work together. While identifying victims, the discovery of an unexpected skull adds a new layer of mystery to the investigation. At some point during their work, a shift in their typically adversarial relationship occurs.

trailers.title: [ Official Pilot ] Cranium ปริศนาซากมรณะ
